ksa_text: Skill in designing and implementing data pipeline monitoring and observability systems, including lineage tracking, data freshness alerting, volume anomaly detection, schema drift detection, execution monitoring, cost attribution, and root-cause analysis tooling for pipeline failures and data quality incidents.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DA-S-005 (Data Architecture/Skill) excluded as edge_case (composite 0.420, highest: EU AI Act at 0.420). Domain prior: edge. Core hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Domain-level data product ownership: data mesh principles, data contracts, domain model governance, inter-domain data agreements, and data product SLA management within a business domain.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with edge_case classification, composite 0.420, and Data Architecture (DA) handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this Data Architecture KSA (composite 0.420)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis of Domain Data Product Owner job postings does not surface this Data Architecture competency as a standard requirement at the relevant level. Exclusion consistent with role focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.
